name: Three Layer Pumpkin Pies
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pie shells.
2. Heat oven to 375°F (190°C).
3. In a large bowl, blend the pumpkin pie filling ingredients and pour half into each pie shell.
4. In a small bowl, combine all streusel ingredients; mix with a fork until crumbly. Sprinkle half of the mixture over the filling in each pie shell.
5. Bake for 50 to 55 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool completely.
6. In a small bowl, soften the gelatin in 1/2 cup cold water; set aside.
7. In a small saucepan, heat milk and water just to boiling but do not boil. Remove from heat; stir in sugar, vanilla, and softened gelatin; mix thoroughly.
8. Add cream cheese and blend with a mixer until well combined. Pour over the baked pies.
9. Sprinkle with pecans. Refrigerate until firm.
